opportunities.title: Software Engineering Intern
opportunities.description: Join our engineering team to build scalable software solutions. Open to pre-final year students pursuing B.Tech/M.Tech.

opportunities.title: Summer Research Fellowship
opportunities.description: Work alongside distinguished scientists on cutting-edge research projects. Covers round-trip train fare and a monthly fellowship stipend.

opportunities.title: Student Contributor
opportunities.description: Write code and learn about open source software development while earning a stipend. Proposals require careful preparation.

opportunities.title: Adam Smith Fellowship
opportunities.description: The fellowship seeks to critically engage key thinkers in the field of political economy. Applicants need to submit a cover letter and a CV, and answer a few short questions. Selected candidates will receive an award of up to 7,000 USD and mentoring from subject experts.
